title: CRITICAL: .env file with hardcoded secrets in backend/
description: P1: farmsense-code/backend/.env contains hardcoded JWT_SECRET, SECRET_KEY, DB_PASSWORD, and DATABASE_URL with embedded credentials (lines 5-14). This file was auto-generated by P1 Security Fixer but must NOT be stored in the workspace. The .env file should only exist locally and be excluded from version control via .gitignore. Immediate action required: Remove this file from the workspace or move to a secure secrets manager.
action_required: Delete farmsense-code/backend/.env file immediately. Ensure .gitignore excludes .env files. Use environment variables or a secrets manager for production.
